hypothesis: Superadmin /api/online-orders returns small int order ids (e.g. 158217) but Supabase web_orders.reference_id stores composite UUID+timestamp strings (e.g. '19a9ce32-575b-461e-8fde-c6ba18550b03-1775033908'). S171 verifier therefore can only assert COUNT parity, not row-level set parity. Without a stable join key, drift detection is shallow.
remediation: Either (a) extend Supabase web_orders to also store the Superadmin int order id as a separate column, or (b) document the canonical join key in sync_web_to_supabase.py: map_order() and propagate it through verify_web_orders_sync.py.
